message:
feat(mesh): implement priority gossip channel for revocation events [MOR/C1.5]

Add RevocationPushMessage for direct peer notification on revocation,
PriorityGossipPolicy (DirectPush/PriorityInterval/Standard), and
priority_gossip_interval_ms (100ms default) + max_revocation_push_peers (32)
to GossipConfig. Revocation pushes use exact ID sets, not XOR filters.
6 tests, clippy clean.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
